q1_sink_dangerous.evidence: Sink is os.path.isfile(full_file_name), a read-only filesystem stat check with no side effects.

q2_observable_after_return.evidence: Function returns bak_file_path, which does not expose whether the tainted full_file_name was passed unsanitized to os.path.isfile.

mock_guidance.capture: Capture the argument full_file_name passed to os.path.isfile and assert it contains user-tainted input without path sanitization or containment checks.
mock_guidance.fake_behavior: Return a deterministic boolean (e.g., True) to allow normal control flow to continue through the function.
notes: Verify that full_file_name is not wrapped in secure_filename, Path.resolve().is_relative_to(), or similar before reaching the sink.
